commands.command: Recompute EVAL-20260716-0001 from frozen artifact IDs and compare JSON and Markdown outputs exactly.
commands.summary: Machine-readable and human-readable evidence reproduced exactly.

summary: Verified completion readiness for PLAN-20260716-0002 and implementation of CAP-0012. The evaluator and repository-tracked evidence are deterministic and reproducible; the frozen corpus contains 43 artifacts, 33 connected targets, and 10 lineage-isolated targets; existing semantic compact coverage is 17 of 43; persisted L0, canonically linked L1, and persisted ArtifactSummary coverage is absent; and existing compact representations do not improve packing through the 1,500-token budget. The evidence supports proposing a separate compact representation contract. Selection effect remains none and GAP-0002 remains open.
